subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of the All-Merciful! The grace and bounty of the Lord God hath placed upon your heads a crown of His supreme bestowal, such that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اماء رحمن فضل و موهبت حضرت یزدان تاجی از موهبت کبری بر هامه شما نهاد که
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @prayer for women, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
